title: Time zero behavior varies on tracing

features.name: 2D unpacked array memory in always_ff with nonblocking write
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array memory accessed via non-blocking assignment inside an always_ff block

features.name: combinational read from memory written via always_ff
features.description: Code should include a combinational assign reading from a memory that is written via non-blocking assignment in an always_ff block

features.name: verilator_public_on_write_data_signal
features.description: Code should include a write_data signal marked with verilator public to prevent optimization during tracing
